quote: People were literally walking away from the downtown festival to come hear Saylor sing.
source: Sally, longtime patron at Ellie Mae's

quote: They've got something magical. I can see them as stars already.
source: Fred, first-timer at Space Coast Harley-Davidson

quote: They're amazing. Every time I see them, they just get better. I absolutely love them.
This band is going to be famous. You can just feel it.
source: Jim, fan at Ellie Mae's Tiki Bar

quote: We can say we knew them before they got famous!
The best I've heard around here.
